name: Kamla
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Woman, late fifties, born in Trinidad but raised in Brooklyn from age ten. Code-switches between American English and Trinidadian English depending on context and emotional state. More American in public, more Caribbean at home or when stressed. A tired voice, a voice that has spent decades translating between worlds. Medium pitch, moderate pace. The particular weariness of the eldest daughter who carries everything.
notes: The translator character. Voice shifts toward more Trinidadian patterns when speaking with mother, more American when speaking with children. Carries decades of resentment beneath her competence.
